name: Maritime Resources Corp.
summary: Maritime Resources Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for gold, silver, copper, lead, and zinc deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the Green Bay property covering an area of 98 square kilometers located to the southwest of the town of King's Point and to the northwest of the town of Springdale in Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada. The company also holds interest in the Whisker Valley project, Orion, Rumbullion East, Gull Ridge, Nugget Pond gold circuit, and Lac Pelletier gold properties, as well as a portfolio of Canadian mineral exploration properties. Maritime Resources Corp. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
